source: serverless.ts (ApiGatewayV2 custom routes via CloudFormation resources)
note: Uses direct ApiGatewayV2 SQS integrations (not Lambda httpApi events). All routes use CUSTOM authorizer.

endpoints.description: Bulk create high priority push notifications (SQS integration)
Bulk create low priority push notifications (SQS integration)
Bulk create high priority emails (SQS integration)
Bulk create low priority emails (SQS integration)
Bulk create high priority SMS (SQS integration)
Bulk create low priority SMS (SQS integration)
SMS Mode callback webhook (dynamic path from config)

note: No HTTP API endpoints. Service is purely event-driven: Kinesis, S3, and DynamoDB stream handlers only.

Send signature reminders in bulk based on filters
Retrieve multiple signatures based on provided criteria
Retrieve employee signatures associated with specific document IDs
Check if the document is signable or not
Download week signature documents as ZIP and send via email
Push a batch of Yousign webhook payloads to the processing SQS queue
Compute auto scheduling data for planning BFF
Get shift metrics for an employee
Get shift metrics for shop and organisation

note: serverless.ts too large (51KB) to fetch fully; HTTP API endpoints inferred from handlers.ts API section
